description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel mounted horizontally on a sturdy wooden stand, featuring three prominent metal hoops encircling its body for structural reinforcement. The wood is textured with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and hand-crafted appearance. At one end, there is a metal spigot for dispensing liquids, and a small wooden tap handle is attached for operation. The top of the barrel has a round bunghole with a wooden stopper, suggesting it is designed to store and dispense beverages such as ale or wine. The stand is constructed from matching wood, with crossed legs for stability and two cradling supports to hold the barrel in place. The overall design is reminiscent of barrels found in taverns, breweries, or outdoor urban markets.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand, featuring a spigot and rustic wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel face, spigot, and tap handle centered on the stand.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, three metal hoops, bunghole on top, and the supporting wooden stand.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed end of the barrel with no spigot, highlighting the wood grain and metal hoop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the spigot visible on the right, showing the barrel's length and stand structure.
